_comment: Multi-portal config for RevOps consultants. One block per client portal. Switch between them by updating PRIVATE_APP_ACCESS_TOKEN or running separate Claude Code / Gemini CLI sessions per client.

_usage.single_portal: Keep one mcpServers block, delete the rest.
_usage.multi_portal: Add one block per client. Each block needs its own Private App token from that client's HubSpot portal.
_usage.naming: Name each server descriptively e.g. hubspot-acme, hubspot-techcorp. This is what your AI agent will reference when you ask it to switch portals.
_usage.switching: Tell your agent: 'Use hubspot-client-b for this query' and it will route to that portal automatically.
_usage.security: Never commit real tokens to git. Use a .env file or secret manager and reference with $ENV_VAR syntax.

_env_var_pattern._comment: Recommended pattern — store tokens in .env, reference here
